# Second Vertical Derivative

**Summary**: A derivative operator used to enhance high-frequency, shallow anomalies in gravity data.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2018-hanif|Hanif, 2018]] applied second-vertical-derivative to identify fault types and estimate dip angles.

## Key Results and Findings

- Used SVD values to distinguish between normal faults (max > min) and thrust faults (max < min). ([[2018-hanif|Hanif, 2018, p. 45]])
